name: TXNM ENERGY INC
summary: PART I THE COMPANY Overview TXNM Energy, Inc. (TXNM), is a holding company with two regulated electric utilities, PNM and TNMP, serving approximately 842,000 residential, commercial, and industrial customers in New Mexico and Texas. TXNM was incorporated in the State of New Mexico in 2000. Vision, Values and Business Objectives TXNMs vision is to create a clean and bright energy future while fulfilling its purpose to work together with customers and communities to meet their energy needs.
